0.details:
I would write how sorry lam
I would wish her to feel better
l would encourage her to do activities that keep her busy
I will wish if l was with her at the moment
0.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I am so deeply sorry for your loss. My heart aches knowing how difficult these days must be for you. I wish I could be by your side right now, offering a shoulder to lean on and quiet companionship when you need it most.

Please remember to take small steps each day. Engaging in simple activities—like walks in the park, reading a favorite book, or trying a new recipe—can help you find moments of peace and ease your mind. Keeping busy doesn’t erase grief, but it can bring brief respites and gentle reminders of life’s small joys.

Know that you are not alone in this. You are surrounded by people who care for you deeply and want to support you however we can. I hope you feel comforted and find strength in the memories you cherish.

With all my love and sympathy,
Your friend
0.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I am so deeply sorry for your loss. My heart aches knowing how difficult these days must be for you. I wish I could be by your side right now, offering a shoulder to lean on and quiet companionship when you need it most. I wish if l was with you at moment.

Please remember to take small steps each day. Engaging in simple activities—like walks in the park, reading a favorite book, or trying a new recipe—can help you find moments of peace and ease your mind. Keeping busy doesn’t erase grief, but it can bring brief respites and gentle reminders of life’s small joys.

Know that you are not alone in this. You are surrounded by people who care for you deeply and want to support you however we can. I hope you feel comforted and find strength in the memories you cherish. If you need any help you should contact me.

With all my love and sympathy,
Your friend

How l always remember her

She should always be kind not to me only
1.model_generation:
Dear Emily,

I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for the incredible help you gave me recently. Your guidance and support made such a difference, and I’m so happy and grateful for everything you did. You have been a true blessing in my life, and I feel so fortunate to know someone as special as you.

Every time I think back on your kindness, I smile. I will always remember the patience, wisdom, and compassion you showed me. Your generosity warmed my heart, and I hope you realize just how much it meant to me.

I believe everyone deserves to experience the same care and encouragement you gave me. Please continue sharing your kindness not just with me, but with everyone around you. You have a remarkable gift for making people feel supported, and the world needs more of that spirit.

With heartfelt thanks,

2.details:
How l missed the moments we used to spend time together
How l miss spending time moments with her
How l want to meet her again
How is she copying in life
2.model_generation:
Hi there,

I hope you’re doing well. Lately I’ve found myself thinking about the laughter we shared and the long afternoons we spent wandering through the park. I miss those moments more than I can say—our easy conversations, impromptu coffee dates, and silly inside jokes. Life has been pretty busy on my end, but I keep wishing we could rewind time and relive those carefree days.

How have you been? How is life treating you these days? I’m eager to hear about everything you’ve been up to, from new adventures to everyday joys. Would you like to grab a coffee or take a walk sometime soon? Let me know what your schedule looks like—I’d love to set aside an afternoon just to catch up.

I can’t wait to hear your voice and share a few stories of my own. Looking forward to seeing you again and making new memories together.

Warm wishes,

3.model_generation:
Good evening, everyone. Today, we gather to celebrate a remarkable person who brings light, laughter, and warmth into every room. I am so proud of all you have achieved—your determination, kindness, and spirit inspire me each day. Watching you grow and embrace every challenge with grace fills me with joy and admiration.

Knowing you has been one of the greatest gifts of my life. Your passion, your generosity, and your ability to make people feel seen and valued remind me why I’m so lucky to be here celebrating with you. As you embark on this new year of adventures, I wish you boundless happiness, opportunity, and all the love you deserve.

I promise to stand by your side, offering support, encouragement, and friendship through every high and low. You are special beyond measure, and I am honored to share this moment with you. Here’s to you, a bright future ahead.

4.details:
I would want to express my apology
I did not mean it
I would ask her to space in her heart to forgive me
We must move on as if nothing happened
4.model_generation:
Hello,

I want to apologize for my actions and my words yesterday. I never intended to hurt you, and I’m deeply sorry for the pain I caused. You matter so much to me, and the last thing I wanted was to create tension between us.

Please find space in your heart to forgive me. I understand that I let you down and broke your trust. I regret my mistake and am committed to learning from it.

I hope we can move forward together as if nothing happened, stronger and more understanding of each other. If you ever feel ready to talk, I’ll be here with an open heart and mind. Your forgiveness would mean the world to me, and I promise to treat you with the respect and care you deserve.

Thank you for listening. I value our relationship more than anything and hope we can put this behind us.

Sincerely,
4.final_version:
I am kindly writing to you expressing my apology about the incident that happened between us 2 weeks ago. Will you kindly have space in your heart to forgive me. 
You should know that l did not do intentionally.

I was suggesting that we can have lunch together if you have free time. Do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything. I wish if we can move on and leave all the past behind us. I would also want you to tell me how you feel about my proposal.

How is work and life treating you. I guess it is getting busier as we are heading to the year end.
Do you have any plans for the holiday so far? I wish to have catch up with you like before when you get chance. I was feeling bad all along so l will feel good if we can meet and solve this.

5.details:
I am happy to have you in my life

5.model_generation: From the moment you came into my life, I knew my world had changed forever. I am so happy to have you by my side, to share laughter, dreams, and understanding. I do not want to imagine my life without your kindness, your unwavering support, and the light you bring to every day. Today is the special day in my life, a day I will never forget. Before our family and friends, I promise to stand by you through laughter and tears, to honor your dreams and share in your joys as if they were my own. I vow to love you without reservation, to grow with you in mind and spirit, and to build a home filled with compassion and understanding. I choose you today and every day, as my partner, my confidant, and my greatest adventure. With all that I am, I pledge my heart to you now and forever.
5.final_version:
Today is the special day in my life. I now know that you are mine. I could not wait for this in my life. I am very proud of us. I would want to give you an assurance that l will be the best candidate for you.

I would want you to be open to me every time. I will be always supportive to you. You have proved to me today that you love me. You are the best honey. I do not know how best l can show you what l mean. You have been supportive to me when l needed help most. I would want you to know that l will always be there for you in every situation.
I do not want to imagine this life without you. You changed my life ever since l have known you. You are my one and only. I would always want you to be the there for me until the end of life.

Yours wifey
